_publications._publicationTitle: Immortalization and characterization of Schwann cell lines derived from NF1-associated cutaneous neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: This cell line as well as 2 others (icNF97.2b and icNF98.4d) have also been published by our group to evaluate the transcriptomic effects of selumetinib
details: Published to evaluate transcriptomic effects of selumetinib
